calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for San Diego Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for San Diego Unified School District is Monday, August 10, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year — one day earlier than the 2025–2026 start date of August 11.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for San Diego Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for San Diego Unified School District is Wednesday, May 26, 2027. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess for San Diego Unified School District runs March 29–April 2, 2027. This year the break overlaps with Easter weekend (April 1–2), concentrating travel demand across the region. For cross-border families, Mexican public schools typically break in mid-April — two weeks later.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for San Diego Unified School District runs December 21, 2026–January 4, 2027 (15 days) — three days longer than the 12-day winter break in 2025–2026. School resumes Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for San Diego Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for San Diego Unified School District runs November 23–27, 2026 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Indigenous Peoples Day
yearNumbers.detail: San Diego Unified observes Indigenous Peoples' Day as a non-instructional day — a district-specific observance not universally observed across California school districts.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Birthday
yearNumbers.detail: A holiday on February 12 (Friday before Presidents' Day on Feb 15) observes Lincoln's Birthday — creating a 4-day weekend that families often discover only after it arrives.

yearNumbers.label: Longer Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs Dec 21–Jan 4 (15 days) vs 12 days in 2025-2026 — the break starts one day earlier and ends two days later, adding 3 extra days off.

calendarNotes: Classes begin August 10, 2026, and end May 26, 2027, with Spring Recess running March 29–April 2 — an especially important break for many cross-border families, since Mexican public schools typically break about two weeks later in mid-April. Indigenous Peoples' Day on October 12 is a non-instructional day, a California-specific school holiday that families arriving from other states sometimes discover only after missing it the first year. February brings two no-school days close together: Lincoln's Birthday on the 12th and Presidents' Day on the 15th — spread far enough apart to trip up childcare planning if you're not watching the calendar. Thanksgiving Break runs November 23–27; Winter Break begins December 21 and ends January 4. San Diego rarely sees the weather events that close schools elsewhere. Published dates rarely change, making it easier to book travel and arrange childcare without leaving much buffer for last-minute changes.
